title: Katsuragis Hand
wikitext:
[]: Katsuragi's Hand?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sat Jul 31, 2010 9:12 pm On the old blue site, someone (I think it was Reichu) made a comment about Dr. Katsuragi's hand being significant in some way. How exactly was it important, besides being nearly stripped of all flesh?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Jul 31, 2010 11:16 pm The Contact Experiment implies that there seems to be some kind of physical contact between the donor and the Eva/Adam. There's a strong motif throughout the series of hands representing/giving/taking life in general (think Shinji's bloody hand, semen hand, and Lilith's hands in EoE) and this would tie into that. The idea being that Dr. Kat would have been the DNA "donor" for Adam, implying that Kaworu would have been born from his DNA like Rei was born from Yui's DNA. It would really complete the Shinji/Misato parallelism thorughout the series. And, as Reichu has pointed out, if Adam's donor is someone in the series, the only real option is Dr. Kat.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Wed Dec 01, 2010 6:44 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: There's a strong motif throughout the series of hands representing/giving/taking life in general

[]: Interesting theory regardless, Batman.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Wed Dec 01, 2010 8:29 pm Was going to say "Whoa! Jimbo's back!" until I saw the date. Holy thread necro, Batman!

[]:             Quote Post by Galaxy News Reidio » Thu Dec 02, 2010 10:28 am That hand of hers glows a burning red! It's grip tells her to drink you!

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Dec 02, 2010 4:16 pm Galaxy News Reidio wrote: That hand of hers glows a burning red! It's grip tells her to drink you!

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Dec 02, 2010 4:30 pm It was probably supposed to be a G Gundam reference.

[]:             Quote Post by Galaxy News Reidio » Thu Dec 02, 2010 4:56 pm It was, but I was paraphrasing from memory so some details are wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Jul 31, 2010 11:16 pm The Contact Experim

[]: Katsuragi's Hand?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sat Jul 31, 2010 9:12 pm On the old blue site, someone (I think it was Reichu) made a comment about Dr. Katsuragi's hand being significant in some way. How exactly was it important, besides being nearly stripped of all flesh?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Jul 31, 2010 11:16 pm The Contact Experiment implies that there seems to be some kind of physical contact between the donor and the Eva/Adam. There's a strong motif throughout the series of hands representing/giving/taking life in general (think Shinji's bloody hand, semen hand, and Lilith's hands in EoE) and this would tie into that. The idea being that Dr. Kat would have been the DNA "donor" for Adam, implying that Kaworu would have been born from his DNA like Rei was born from Yui's DNA. It would really complete the Shinji/Misato parallelism thorughout the series. And, as Reichu has pointed out, if Adam's donor is someone in the series, the only real option is Dr. Kat.
